title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the essential iterative steps of EDA, from data ingestion to insight generation and next steps.
relationships: Process begins with data import and cleaning
Leads to univariate analysis of single variables
Progresses to bivariate analysis of variable pairs
Advances to multivariate analysis of multiple variables
Analysis may loop back to handle issues found
Results in visualization and summary statistics
Final output is a set of insights and hypotheses for further testing
